series_metadata.series_title: Authorization to Obtain and Release Information
series_metadata.series_description: This document authorizes an agent or representative of the Ohio Department of Public Safety to obtain any information pertaining to education, work, attendance, and/or disciplinary records from any of the references that are listed on the form. The form is completed by applicant when applying for employment. After completion of interview and employee selection, the form is retained in the application for employment bid folder and scheduled separately.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one year then pull for destruction., Paper: Shred
